Closes #

## Checklist

- [ ] **Tests added, RED-before-GREEN** — I watched the new test(s) fail before writing the implementation.
- [ ] **Suite passes with `jsonschema` ABSENT and PRESENT** (`pip uninstall jsonschema` and installed).
- [ ] **Docs updated** (README / `docs/` / CHANGELOG as applicable).
- [ ] **Clean-room** — no dependency on, import of, or copied text from any other agent/methodology framework (e.g. superpowers).
- [ ] **Human-gated writes respected** — no new silent/autonomous durable write to code, memory, or config.
- [ ] **No vendor-prefixed names**; Apache-2.0 / MoStack conventions kept.
